questions.question: This reality show, hosted by Anderson Cooper, gave contestants challenges, but someone on the team was out to sabotage them.
In the 90s, an email might state it had to be forwarded to 50 friends or some catastrophe would occur. What was the generic name?
Name the legendary female rapper, writer, producer, and Grammy winner whose debut album was Supa Dupa Fly.
In 1993, this pop star was accused of child molestation.
What is a Mudblood?
questions.answer: A witch or wizard with non-magical parents (Harry Potter)
